name: api-handshake-skill
description: Plan API integration handshakes with local checklists, fixtures, and acceptance tests.

scripts.smoke: rm -rf tmp && node bin/api-handshake-skill.js plan test/fixtures/specs --out tmp/integration-plan.md && node bin/api-handshake-skill.js fixtures tmp/integration-plan.md --out tmp/fixtures && test -s tmp/fixtures/request.json && test -s tmp/fixtures/response.json
